hook: Your body clock affects more than just sleep duration.

script.hook: Did you know your body has a clock that influences your health beyond just how long you sleep?
beats: Every cell in your body has its own 24-hour clock, governed by light and your daily habits.
When your schedule disrupts this clock, it can lead to serious health issues like metabolic syndrome and increased cancer risk.
For example, eating at the wrong time can affect how your body processes food, leading to weight gain.
script.close: Follow BestKarma for science-backed health without the hype.
